items.excerpt: Unix permissions were built for humans. AI agents inherit them wholesale. The structural failure has a name — the confused deputy problem, coined in 1988 — and a kernel-level fix that arrived in 2021. nono is the first tool to apply it to AI agents. NVIDIA noticed and built NemoClaw five weeks late…
